title: Native Select
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Native Select wrapper using native select, option, and optgroup markup.

examples.title: NativeSelectRtl
examples.description: RTL native select example with local Arabic strings.

deviations.summary: Chevron icon uses a local inline SVG instead of lucide-react.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react. The local SVG preserves the native-select icon slot, geometry, and aria-hidden contract.

deviations.summary: RTL example uses local constants instead of the origin language-selector runtime dependency.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on the origin app language selector. Local Arabic example constants preserve the default RTL rendered output while fixture aliases keep the origin evidence bundleable.
